decisions.reason: Third-party interpretation may be useful as a candidate, but no primary or official source cross-check is recorded.
decisions.required_next_action: Cross-check against primary RAG governance sources or internal WAES citation policy before any limited acceptance.

decisions.reason: The result appears to reference a standard, but the page may be a commercial mirror and the authoritative standard source/version has not been verified.
decisions.required_next_action: Verify the standard identifier, version, effective scope, and authoritative publication source.

decisions.reason: Vendor glossary content cannot define GFIS source-of-record behavior without internal GFIS evidence and WAES review.
decisions.required_next_action: Cross-check against internal GFIS execution traceability evidence and keep vendor content as background only.

decisions.reason: Open-source repository candidate requires license, maintenance, security relevance, and fit review before limited acceptance.
decisions.required_next_action: Verify repository license, maintenance state, commit context, and whether it maps to WAES evidence-gate policy.

decisions.reason: Repository is relevant to the capability under review, but production integration is not proven and version/license verification must remain explicit.
decisions.required_next_action: Verify repository license, version alignment with the isolated PoC, and keep the result as candidate capability evidence only.
